entryRules.primaryTrigger: Enter long when RSI(14) crosses above 45 AND price reclaims EMA50 ($685.20) from below with increasing volume.
entryRules.confirmation: Confirmation: Funding rate below 0.005% AND MACD signal line crossing above zero AND volume 24h exceeds prior day by 15%.

timeStop.description: Exit if no significant movement after 15 1d candles

invalidation: If BTC dominance rises above 59.2% within 48h, this altcoin setup is invalidated (capital rotating to BTC).
If Fear & Greed Index drops below 25 (currently 62), bullish thesis is invalidated.
If price closes below $652.33 (3% below nearest support), exit immediately.
If RSI(14) drops below 30 and MACD crosses bearish, regime has shifted.
If funding rate exceeds 0.05% (extreme greed in leverage), reduce position by 50%.

backtestParameters.benchmark: BTC total return over same period
